title: ATDD prompt asks each scenario to start from an empty system; acceptance tests run against the full real dataset
evidence: tests/test_acceptance.py:32 fixture builds a server over data/kaggle; tests like test_flamengo_won_2019_brasileirao (line 298) assert dataset-specific facts rather than seeded fixtures
suggestion: The public-interface / atomicity asks are met; to fully satisfy the 'empty system, no shared data' instruction, seed a small fixture dataset per scenario instead of asserting against the shipped CSVs

title: Team matching uses substring contains, which can over-match merged clubs
evidence: data_loader.py:251 get_team_stats uses `frag in home_norm`; data_loader.py:200 find_matches uses case-insensitive contains. A short fragment like 'Atletico' matches Atletico-MG/PR/GO collectively
suggestion: Document the partial-match semantics or offer an exact-match flag; acceptable for the spec's 'normalize team names' note but can conflate distinct clubs

title: run-summary skill not invocable in this environment
evidence: skills/run-summary exists but is not exposed via the Skill tool during this evaluation; architecture summary not generated under summary/
suggestion: Run `summarize codebase <run_dir>` separately if an architecture map is needed
